titleStmt.title: SII 5.1382: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1382. (A.R. No. 19 of 1897). ON A PILLAR IN FRONT OF THE SHRINE OF THE GODDESS IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiruvaḷar tiraḷpuyat tirunila valaiya n=ta ṉ maṇippū
ṇeṉat tāṅkip paṉmaṇik koṟṟaveṇkuṭai niḻaṟkuvalai
yattuyirkaḷaip peṟṟatāyilum peṇi maṟṟuḷa Aṟaikaḻal
laracar tanṉaṭiniḻalotuṅka Uṟaipilattuṭai kali Otuṅka muṟai
ceytu viraimalaṟ teriyal vikkala(ṉ)noṭum varicilait
taṭakkai [mācāman=ta rai] k kaṅkapāṭik kaḷattiṭai niṉṟut tiṅkapat
Āṅkavaṉ veṅkainaāṭṭiṭai miṭṭuḻavarvi
ṭat tāṅkarum peruvalit taṇṭu keṭat tākki mātaṇṭanāyaka
ṉ cāmuṇṭar[āja]ṉai ceṟṟavaṉ cirattiṉai Aṟuttu maṟṟavaṉ Oru makaḷākiya
Irukayaṉ tevi nākalaiyeṉnum tokaiyañcāyalai mukattoṭu
mūkku veṟākkip pakaittetir mūṉṟām vicaiyiṉum Eṉṟetir
porutu paripavaṉeṉṉaka karutik kūṭalcaṅkamat tākalamallaṉ (mallaṉ) makkaḷā
kiya vikkalaṉ ciṅkaṉ Eṉṟivartammoṭu Eṇṇili cāmantarai veṉṟa
ṭu tūci muṉviṭṭu taṉṟuṇaimainta ru(m)n=tā m pinnaṭuttiruntu va
ṭakaṭalena vakutta vattāṉaiyai kaṭakaḷi ṟoṉṟāl kalakki Aṭalpuri kocalaciṅ
kaṉaikkoṭipaṭai mun tūci veṇkaḷiṟṟoṭu n tuṇittuk kecavaṉ taṇṭa
nāyaṉ tārkkettaraiyaṉ tiṇṭiṟal mārayan cinappottaraiyaṉ E
ccayaṉ Ireccayaṉ Ikalcey poṟkotai muven=ta yeṉṟār taṭuttuppil
Anekacāman=ta raic cinṉapinṉañ ceytu piṉṉai mutaliyākiya
yatuvaṇan noṭa viritta talaiyoṭu vikkala noṭa cerut
toḻi(l) laḻin tu ciṅkaṇa noṭa Aṇṇalar mutalikaḷ
Aṉaivarum Amarpor paṇṇiya pakaṭiḻi nto ṭa naṇṇiya ( paka
ṭiḻin=to ṭa naṇṇiya) Ahavamallaṉ Avarkku muṉṉoṭa taṉve
ka(veka)veṅkaḷiṟṟiṉai vilakki vātai koṇṭāṅkavar tāramum A
var kulatanamum caṅku n=to ṅkalu n=tā raiyum periyum me
kaṭampamum veṇcāmaraiyum Oṭṭakaniraiyum valokā
sanamum puṣ pakapiṭiyūm porukaḷiṟ ṟiṭṭamum pāyparit
tokutiyum parimāppalavum paṟittu ceyoḷi virasi
ṅhāsanam pārtoḻa veṟi Eḻiltaru Ulakam muḻutuṭai
yā(ḷ)ḷoṭum vicaiya maṇimakuṭam me[ n tu vi] cai koḷḷātatu mā
ppuravi pottappiven=ta ṉai vāraṇavaṉaikaḻal keraḷaṉṟaṉṉai
tārcaṉṉātaṉ(ṉātan) tampiyai poṟkaḷat talaṅkal cūḻ pacun=ta
lai Arin tu pulaṅkaḻal teṉna śrīvallavan ciṟuvaṉ mi
ṉṉavil maṇimuṭi virakecariyai matuvarai yoṉṟāl va
taippittu takaiyil ceralar tammoṭu ceṅkiraiyar kulam veraṟa
ppaṟin=to ṭi melkaṭal Oḷittalum tevaṉātaṉum cittiyu
ṅ keciyu muvaru n=ta ṉittaṉi mutukiṭa pāvarum Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilak
kamum muraṭṭoḻil Aṭakki muḻaṅkeri Ūṭṭi veṅkatir puli yeṟa
viyantu viḷaiyāṭi tuṅkapattiraikarai caippattirattūṇ nā
ṉilappāca ṉāṭṭi meṉnāḷ van=ta vappiraṭṭaṉai vallavanākki cūtarak
kaṇṭikai cūṭṭi kon=ta ḷar Araicaṉum makkaḷum Aimmaṭiñ citta
ṉ pucai Āṉaip puḻaikkai nilam piḻait tivavulakam me
llām Aṟiya Oṭi paritoru palakaiyyil paḻutaṟa Eḻutip
palakaiyuñ cārtti Ippaṭikku kāśya (ya)pan caraṇan tirumulan Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku kāśya yapan tevakaṇātapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kośi ka
n Akattiyapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kāśya yapan tuṟaiyan tiruvuṟa(l)luṭai
yāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku paṭṭācāriyan taruṇentucekarapaṭṭa neḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 5.1382 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
